'''tadhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickerpecker|nickerpecker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickerpecker|nickerpecker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tadhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhipith|tædhipith]] || [[word:tædhipij|tædhipij]] || [[word:tædhipish|tædhipish]] || [[word:tædhipi|tædhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhudhuputh|tadhudhuputh]] || [[word:tadhudhupuj|tadhudhupuj]] || [[word:tadhudhupush|tadhudhupush]] || [[word:tadhudhupu|tadhudhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhuputh|tadhuputh]] || [[word:tadhupuj|tadhupuj]] || [[word:tadhupush|tadhupush]] || [[word:tadhupu|tadhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhufputh|tadhufputh]] || [[word:tadhufpuj|tadhufpuj]] || [[word:tadhufpush|tadhufpush]] || [[word:tadhufpuf|tadhufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhuputhu|tadhuputhu]] || [[word:tadhupuju|tadhupuju]] || [[word:tadhupushu|tadhupushu]] || [[word:tadhupuku|tadhupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhuputh|tadhuputh]] || [[word:tadhupuj|tadhupuj]] || [[word:tadhupush|tadhupush]] || [[word:tadhupu|tadhupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhuputhul|tadhuputhul]] || [[word:tadhupujul|tadhupujul]] || [[word:tadhupushul|tadhupushul]] || [[word:tadhupukul|tadhupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhuputhuthu|tadhuputhuthu]] || [[word:tadhupujuju|tadhupujuju]] || [[word:tadhupushushu|tadhupushushu]] || [[word:tadhupuku|tadhupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhuputhun|tadhuputhun]] || [[word:tadhupujun|tadhupujun]] || [[word:tadhupushun|tadhupushun]] || [[word:tadhupukun|tadhupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhuputhuoro|tadhuputhuoro]] || [[word:tadhupujuoro|tadhupujuoro]] || [[word:tadhupushuoro|tadhupushuoro]] || [[word:tadhupukuoro|tadhupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
